title: Customer Service Officer [Education Centre]
description:
Location: East/ West/North

Employment Type: Full-time

Working Hours: Wed - Fri + Sat & Sun


About the Role

Love working with kids and helping them learn? Enjoy being the go-to person who keeps things running smoothly? Our client is looking for a Customer Service Officer to support the day-to-day operations of their education centre, where they teach and nurture pre-primary and primary students.


It is a dynamic, knowledge-driven role — you’ll need to know the programmes and processes well to guide parents, support teachers, and help every child get the most out of their learning journey.

You’ll be the friendly bridge between parents, students, teachers, and colleagues — ensuring great communication and creating a positive experience for everyone who walks through our doors!


What You’ll Be Doing

  • Manage, coordinate, and facilitate class schedules for the centre.
  • Handle walk-ins, calls, and online enquiries — providing helpful course consultations to parents and students.
  • Support day-to-day administrative operations to keep the centre running smoothly.

What We’re Looking For

  • Great interpersonal and communication skills — you enjoy talking to people and working with children.
  • Able to coordinate and liaise with parents and teachers
  • Able to work independently or as a team and able to prioritize work on hand
  • Able to work on both weekends and 3 weekdays (in line with the centre’s operating hours).
  • Min. GCE 'N' Level
  • Candidates with customer service experience from other industries are welcome to apply too


If you’re positive, people-oriented, and ready to be part of an energetic education team, we’d love to meet you!



Interested candidates kindly click APPLY NOW to submit your latest CV.


We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.



Search Avenue Pte Ltd

EA License No.: 25C2695

EA Registration No.: R25157669 [Amanda Wee]

postedCompany.description:
At Search Avenue Pte Ltd, we believe recruitment is more than just filling positions — it’s about building futures. Founded by two passionate individuals with over 12 years of recruitment experience, Search Avenue was born out of a shared vision: to raise the standards of recruitment through integrity, innovation, and unwavering dedication to people.

We are deeply committed to understanding the evolving needs of both employers and candidates. Our approach combines advanced technology with a human touch, ensuring personalized, efficient, and meaningful hiring experiences. Whether it’s permanent placements, executive searches, or talent mapping, our mission remains the same — to connect top-tier talent with companies that value diversity, capability, and culture fit.

Driven by our founders’ belief in work-life harmony, we champion flexible career opportunities and inclusive workplaces. Our goal is to empower individuals to thrive in their careers while honoring their personal commitments — and to help businesses grow stronger through passionate, high-performing teams.

At Search Avenue, recruitment is our craft — and people are our purpose.
